text:
Aiboni Clan (, Aiboni-zoku) is a clan with a special greeting. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 0, Chapter 1 

Overview

The Aiboni Clan is a clan whose greeting is putting their noses together. 

Plot

Kurapika's Memories

Kurapika mentions the Aiboni Clan and the Miha Clan during one of the written tests he takes to gain approval to venture out into the outside world. 

References
